description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. Use the node:10.13.0 Docker image for a build job named build that runs the commands rm package-lock.json, npm install, and npm run build-prod, then saves the dist directory as an artifact expiring after 30 minutes. Use the python:latest Docker image for a deploy job named deploy that runs only on the master branch, is manual, and executes pip install awscli, aws s3 cp ./dist/BrawlDB-Frontend/ s3://brawldb-beta/ --recursive --include "*", and aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E17VAWVQQ0YUPI --paths /* to upload the built files to S3 and invalidate the CloudFront distribution.
